title: AtmosTransport Run TOML
description: Prototype schema for AtmosTransport runtime TOML files. This is intentionally scoped to config/examples while the complete config registry is still being designed.

input.description: Transport-binary input source. Use either an explicit binary_paths list or a folder plus start/end date range.

binary_paths.description: Explicit list of transport binary files to replay, in chronological order.

folder.description: Folder containing daily transport binaries. Paths may use ~ for the user home directory.

start_date.description: First date to include when expanding input.folder, formatted as YYYY-MM-DD.

end_date.description: Last date to include when expanding input.folder, formatted as YYYY-MM-DD.

use_gpu.description: Run on CUDA GPU when true. Use false for local CPU debugging.

float_type.description: Floating point type used by runtime state and heavy NetCDF output payloads.

enumValues: Use for GPU production runs and smaller NetCDF output.
Use for CPU reference runs and stricter validation.
Most diffusive but robust first-order upwind scheme.
Second-order slope-limited scheme used by current validation configs.
Piecewise parabolic method. Requires wider CS halos.
Lin-Rood style CS advection path where supported.

diffusion.description: Vertical diffusion operator. Omit this table for no diffusion.

value.description: Constant Kz value in m^2/s when kind = constant.

convection.description: Convection operator. Omit this table for no convection.

output.description: Diagnostic NetCDF snapshot output. Current runtime supports single-file snapshot output; mode/path_template show the intended OutputPlan direction.

mode.description: Prototype OutputPlan mode. single_file matches current runtime behavior; daily_files/per_snapshot are planned scheduling policies.

enumValues: Write all requested snapshot times into one NetCDF file.
Planned: split output into one NetCDF file per simulation day.
Planned: write one NetCDF file per captured snapshot.

snapshot_file.description: NetCDF output path for current single-file runtime snapshot output.

path_template.description: Prototype path template for planned split output, e.g. ~/.../{date}/snapshot_{date}.nc.

snapshot_hours.description: Simulation-relative output times in hours. Current runtime captures exactly these times.

frequency.description: Prototype cadence shorthand for future OutputPlan scheduling, e.g. 6h, 1d, every_step.

deflate_level.description: NetCDF deflate compression level for heavy payload variables. 0 disables compression; 1 is a good production default.

shuffle.description: Enable the NetCDF shuffle filter when deflate_level > 0.

provenance.description: Prototype switch for planned reproducibility metadata: command line, Julia/package versions, git status, normalized config, and input hashes.

tracers.description: Tracer definitions keyed by tracer name. Each tracer can define an initial condition and optional surface flux.

background.description: Uniform background mixing ratio in mol/mol when kind = uniform.

file.description: Input NetCDF or binary file when kind = file.

surface_flux.description: Optional live surface flux source for this tracer.

time_index.description: Time index to read from the source file.
